name: Stark Focus Group, Inc.
business: Stark Focus Group, Inc. has no revenues and is entering the Drone / Unmanned Aerial Vehicles market with its brand RevoluDrones. The company purchased licenses for patents to assist in its drone business.

exposures.sentence: On July 18, 2022, the Company announced that it is entering the Drone / Unmanned Aerial Vehicles market with the launch of its new brand, RevoluDrones.
On July 20, 2022, the Company purchased 10-month licenses for 4 patents to assist in its drone business.
